name: syn
description: Syntaris: a compilation-stage knowledge layer and harness engineering implementation for AI coding agents. Five-phase gate model, three-layer memory, calibration loop, multi-runtime support across 8 harnesses (Tier 1: Claude Code, Tier 2: Cursor/Windsurf, Tier 3: Codex CLI/Gemini CLI/Aider/Kiro/OpenCode), personal/client billing branch.
